source.section: AFCS (Automatic Flight Control System) > CPL (Coupled Steering) Mode > CPL ASL Sub-Mode Example

steps.action: Select and arm a weapon that can be released with a CCRP/AUTO mode (like a MK-82 bomb, for instance)
steps.voiced: Select and arm a CCRP/AUTO compatible weapon.

steps.action: Designate a target using available sensors (like a targeting pod designating a target with Auto/Point Track).
steps.voiced: Designate a target using available sensors.

steps.action: When target is designated, HSI page should display a boxed TGT (Target) and the HUD should display an ASL (Azimuth Steering Line) with a target designation diamond.
steps.voiced: Confirm HSI shows boxed TGT and HUD shows ASL with designation diamond.

steps.action: Make sure your stick is centered, no force is applied on it and that you have an appropriate deadzone (see CONTROLS SETUP - WHAT YOU NEED MAPPED section).
steps.voiced: Confirm stick is centered with no input force and deadzone is configured.

steps.action: If desired, click and hold (Left/Right mouse button) the CRS (Course Set) knob to set desired course (CSEL) to approach the target from.
steps.voiced: Optionally set the CRS knob for desired approach course.

steps.action: Press the AP button on the UFC to show the autopilot options.
steps.voiced: Press AP on the UFC to show autopilot options.

steps.action: Press the OSB adjacent “CPL” to activate coupled autopilot mode.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to CPL to activate coupled autopilot mode.

steps.action: A colon will appear (“:CPL”) to indicate that it is active. “CPL ASL” will appear on both the HSI and HUD.
steps.voiced: Confirm :CPL is active and CPL ASL appears on HSI and HUD.

steps.action: If desired, select BALT (Barometric Altitude Hold) mode to maintain level flight while steering towards the target. A colon will appear (“:BALT”) to indicate that it is active.
steps.voiced: Optionally select BALT to hold barometric altitude — confirm :BALT is active.

steps.action: The autopilot will steer towards the selected target.
steps.voiced: Confirm autopilot steers toward the designated target.

steps.action: You can disengage autopilot by pressing the Paddle Switch on the control stick.
steps.voiced: Press the Paddle Switch on the control stick to disengage autopilot.
